zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Horton於1279年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾可納普托福特時，他的父親Hugh de Horton39歲，母親Joan de Redesdale20歲。他於1299年與Maude de Bosco在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾莫福斯利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1345年4月4日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾莫福斯利享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Horton于1279年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾可納普托福特时，他的父亲Hugh de Horton39岁，母亲Joan de Redesdale20岁。他于1299年与Maude de Bosco在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾莫福斯利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1345年4月4日在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾莫福斯利享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Horton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Warwickshire): habitational name from one or other of the many places so called, such as those in Berkshire, Buckinghamshire, Dorset, Gloucestershire, Herefordshire, Northamptonshire, Shropshire, Somerset, Staffordshire, Wiltshire, and Yorkshire. Most of the placenames derive from Old English horh or horu ‘dirt, filth’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some may have different origins, including Horton in Gloucestershire, which may derive from Old English heorot ‘hart, stag’ + tūn.

variants.name: Horten
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farms named Horten, from an unattested word denoting ‘uneven, hard and lumpy soil’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Horton was born in 1279, in Knaptoft, Leicestershire, England, his father, Hugh de Horton, was 39 and his mother, Joan de Redesdale, was 20. He married Maude de Bosco in 1299, in Mowsley, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 4 April 1345, in Mowsley, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Horton est né en 1279, à Knaptoft, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Horton, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Joan de Redesdale, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Maude de Bosco en 1299, à Mowsley, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 avril 1345, à Mowsley, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Horton 1279 in Knaptoft, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Horton 39 und seine Mutter Joan de Redesdale 20. Er hat 1299 in Mowsley, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Maude de Bosco geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. April 1345 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Mowsley, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Horton è nato il nel 1279 nel Knaptoft, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Hugh de Horton, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Redesdale, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Maude de Bosco nel 1299, nel Mowsley, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 aprile 1345, nel Mowsley, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Hortonが1279年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアナプトフトで生まれた時，父Hugh de Hortonは39歳，母Joan de Redesdaleは20歳であった。1299年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアモウスリーでMaude de Boscoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1345年4月4日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアモウスリーで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Horton(이)가 1279년 영국 레이스스터실르 냅토프트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Horton(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Redesdale(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1299년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 모우슬리에서 Maude de Bosco(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1345년 4월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 모우슬리에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Horton nasceu em 1279, em Knaptoft, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Horton, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Redesdale, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Maude de Bosco em 1299, em Mowsley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 4 de abril de 1345, em Mowsley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Horton родился в 1279 г. в местности наптофт, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Horton было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Redesdale, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Maude de Bosco в 1299 г. в местности моусли, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 4 апреля 1345 г. в местности моусли, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Horton nació en 1279, en Knaptoft, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Horton, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Joan de Redesdale, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Maude de Bosco en 1299, en Mowsley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 4 de abril de 1345, en Mowsley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años.
